name: Kill. Nominate. Accuse. Vote. Execute.
author: boypower2566
bootlegger: Only 1 other Bootlegger rule applies during a game, players know which one it is.
Knaves: There are 2 Storytellers: one lies & one tells the truth. Once per game, at dusk, they might switch.
Super Knaves: There are 2 Storytellers: 0-2 of them lie, those who don't lie tell the truth.
Parlor Knaves: There are 3 Storytellers: At least one tells the truth, at least one lies.
Indecisive Knaves: There are 3 Storytellers: One tells the truth, One lies, One can do either.
Shuffling Knaves: There are 2 Storytellers: one lies & one tells the truth. Up to twice per game, at dusk, they might switch.
Lone Knave: There is 1 Storyteller, they either lie or tell the truth, Once per game, at dusk, they might swap.
Poisoned Knaves: There are 2 Storytellers: one lies & one tells the truth, Once per game, at the beginning of the night, the Demon may choose a Storyteller, they swap.
